string 2:
What the heck is that dummy doing? The next shift should
have taken over by now.
{next}Is something wrong?
{next}Who're you talking about?
{next}You look sleepy.

My Central Tower security coworker still hasn't come back
from work.

It's my Central Tower security coworker. They haven't come
back from work yet.

I'm finally off duty after working security at Central
Tower, but my coworker still hasn't come back.

Something might have happened to them, but they're also a
habitual slacker who tends to nap on the clock...

But if something DID happen, it'd be a whole situation... I
suppose it's best to go and check on them.

I'm off duty now, though, and we have a strict "no overtime"
policy. Could you go in my place?
{next}Sure thing.
{end}I don't work for free.

Sorry to trouble you. This "no overtime" thing is kind of a
double-edged sword.

I don't blame you for saying so. I know I sure wouldn't want
to do anything for no pay.

Please, I'm begging you! Go check up on my coworker at
Central Tower.

Zzz... Mm, ngh... Cut it out! I'm going to rust...
*mumbling*
{next}Are you okay, Hagurumon?
{next}Wake up!
{next}Let me oil you up.

Gotta take care of this squeaking... It's embarrassing...
Mm, mmm... *yawn*
Mm, hmm... What? Morning already? *yawn*

Oh, wow! My gears are totally greased...! Gigi! Aww, it was
just a dream...

How did I...? Oh, right. I had my eyes down picking up some
trash, and ran into someone...

Oh, no! I got to get back, fast! We've got a "no overtime"
policy in place these days!
Well, I better run! Thanks for waking me up!
Ah, there you are! I've been waiting for you.

My coworker came back just a little while ago. You're the
one who woke them up, right?

Thanks! That was a big relief. And here's a reward! I
couldn't let you work for free!

Sorry for the hassle. This "no overtime" thing is kind of a
double-edged sword.

My coworker should be cleaning up over near the entrance to
Central Tower.

They probably wouldn't be inside, so look around the
entrance. Thanks!

Zzz... I did it... I finally did it! Praise me, Master...
*mumbling*
{next}Are you okay, Hagurumon?
{next}Wake up!
{next}Nice palette swap!

You got the wrong 'mon! I'm Solarmon, not Hagurumon! ...Oh,
wait. Was I sleeping?

Zzz... Master, your hug... It's too tight...! ...Oh, wait.
Was I sleeping?

I'm not a recolored Hagurumon, dangit! I'm Solarmon! ...Oh,
wait. Was I sleeping?

Oh, that's right... I was trying to pluck a Parrotmon plume
on my master's orders...

I had my eyes down, searching, and ran into something! Dang,
I must've been knocked out.
Just you watch, Master! I'll keep my promise. I swear!

There was this Solarmon that was slackin', so I told them to
go get a Parrotmon plume!

I said if they do, I'll make them my disciple. That little
'mon's got a lotta promise!

Yer kinda like Minerva's disciple, right? Disciples gotta do
what their masters say!
You report back to Hagurumon.
